column1: # ci/gates/manifest.tsv — SINGLE SOURCE for the CI<->local gate map (T-5).
# This file is the one place that enumerates every CI gate and how (or whether)
# scripts/ship.sh mirrors it locally. ship.sh reads ONLY this file; it has no
# hardcoded gate list. CODEOWNERS-protected and SHA-pinned (.ship-hashes.sha256).
# It is the Laravel-monolith answer to T-5's "Docker-image-by-digest" mirror:
# this repo's CI runs ~16 jobs directly on ubuntu-latest with setup-php/
# setup-node — there is NO container image to pull, so the execution-environment
# contract is captured here (tool + ci_version columns) and enforced by
#   script      ci/gates/<x>.sh to run locally, or '-' for delta-only gates
#   workdir     repo-relative dir to run in ('.', 'backend', 'frontend')
#                 needs-tool runs iff `tool` is on PATH, else reported as delta
#                 needs-db   runs iff the test DB is reachable, else delta
#                 delta      never run locally (heavy/infra); always in delta
#   tool        primary tool for PATH + version checks (php/node/pnpm/composer/gitleaks/docker/bash)
#   ci_version  version CI pins for `tool` ('-' if not version-pinned)
# WHEN CI CHANGES: update this row (and the gate script). Re-pin hashes via

column2: Backend static analysis (php -l, pint, phpstan L5, psalm L1)
OpenAPI Spectral lint + runtime enum contract
